case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. VS. ANTHONY O BRAVO ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT BRAVO, ANTHONY O DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-19-2017
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 61781924) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 61781924) AS TO DEFENDANT BRAVO, ANTHONY O
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY, (TRANSACTION ID # 100046341): REESE, HARLAN M SUBSTITUTED FOR WINN, BRIAN N AS ATTORNEY FOR WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.
DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 61781924) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100026541), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. SERVED MAR-09-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAR-14-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT BRAVO, ANTHONY O
DECLARATION RE: UNDERLYING ACTION OF ACCOUNT STATED (TRANSACTION ID # 61781924) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-13-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-13-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAVO, ANTHONY O $7,368.14 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,368.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 61781924)

PLAINTIFFS AFFIDAVIT OF MILITARY STATUS IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 61781924) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK N.A.
